stemHtml: When a controlled flight inadvertently deviates from its current flight plan, the appropriate air traffic service unit must be informed when...

options.a: the average true air speed varies by plus or minus 5% of the true air speed given in the flight plan.
options.b: a deviation is made from the track.
options.d: the estimated time to the next reporting point is found to be in error in excess of ten minutes.
